	child_ctx[58] = list[i];
	child_ctx[59] = list;
	child_ctx[60] = i;
	return child_ctx;
}

function create_if_block_23(ctx) {
	let svg;
	let polyline;

	const block = {
		c: function create() {
			svg = svg_element("svg");
			polyline = svg_element("polyline");
			attr_dev(polyline, "points", "20 6 9 17 4 12");
			attr_dev(polyline, "class", "s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(polyline, file, 1372, 24, 52459);
			attr_dev(svg, "xmlns", "http://www.w3.org/2000/svg");
			attr_dev(svg, "width", "20");
			attr_dev(svg, "height", "20");
			attr_dev(svg, "viewBox", "0 0 24 24");
			attr_dev(svg, "fill", "none");
			attr_dev(svg, "stroke", "currentColor");
			attr_dev(svg, "stroke-width", "3");
			attr_dev(svg, "stroke-linecap", "round");
			attr_dev(svg, "stroke-linejoin", "round");
			attr_dev(svg, "class", "s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(svg, file, 1371, 20, 52252);
		},
		m: function mount(target, anchor) {
			insert_dev(target, svg, anchor);
			append_dev(svg, polyline);
		},
		d: function destroy(detaching) {
			if (detaching) {
				detach_dev(svg);
			}
		}
	};

	dispatch_dev("SvelteRegisterBlock", {
		block,
		id: create_if_block_23.name,
		type: "if",
		source: "(1372:16) {#if notification.type === 'success'}",
		ctx
	});

	return block;
}

// (1361:4) {#each notifications as notification (notification.id)}
function create_each_block_3(key_1, ctx) {
	let div5;
	let div0;
	let t0;
	let t1;
	let t2;
	let t3;
	let div3;
	let div1;
	let t4;
	let t5;
	let t6;
	let t7;
	let div2;
	let t8_value = /*notification*/ ctx[66].message + "";
	let t8;
	let t9;
	let div4;
	let t10;
	let div5_class_value;
	let div5_intro;
	let div5_outro;
	let current;
	let if_block0 = /*notification*/ ctx[66].type === 'success' && create_if_block_23(ctx);
	let if_block1 = /*notification*/ ctx[66].type === 'error' && create_if_block_22(ctx);
	let if_block2 = /*notification*/ ctx[66].type === 'info' && create_if_block_21(ctx);
	let if_block3 = /*notification*/ ctx[66].type === 'warning' && create_if_block_20(ctx);
	let if_block4 = /*notification*/ ctx[66].type === 'success' && create_if_block_19(ctx);
	let if_block5 = /*notification*/ ctx[66].type === 'error' && create_if_block_18(ctx);
	let if_block6 = /*notification*/ ctx[66].type === 'info' && create_if_block_17(ctx);
	let if_block7 = /*notification*/ ctx[66].type === 'warning' && create_if_block_16(ctx);

	const block = {
		key: key_1,
		first: null,
		c: function create() {
			div5 = element("div");
			div0 = element("div");
			if (if_block0) if_block0.c();
			t0 = space();
			if (if_block1) if_block1.c();
			t1 = space();
			if (if_block2) if_block2.c();
			t2 = space();
			if (if_block3) if_block3.c();
			t3 = space();
			div3 = element("div");
			div1 = element("div");
			if (if_block4) if_block4.c();
			t4 = space();
			if (if_block5) if_block5.c();
			t5 = space();
			if (if_block6) if_block6.c();
			t6 = space();
			if (if_block7) if_block7.c();
			t7 = space();
			div2 = element("div");
			t8 = text(t8_value);
			t9 = space();
			div4 = element("div");
			t10 = space();
			attr_dev(div0, "class", "notification-icon s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			set_style(div0, "background", "linear-gradient(135deg, #" + /*themeColor*/ ctx[8] + " 0%, #" + /*themeColor*/ ctx[8] + " 100%)");
			set_style(div0, "box-shadow", "0 0 15px rgba(" + parseInt(/*themeColor*/ ctx[8].substring(0, 2), 16) + ", " + parseInt(/*themeColor*/ ctx[8].substring(2, 4), 16) + ", " + parseInt(/*themeColor*/ ctx[8].substring(4, 6), 16) + ", 0.5)");
			add_location(div0, file, 1366, 12, 51851);
			attr_dev(div1, "class", "notification-title s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(div1, file, 1397, 16, 54186);
			attr_dev(div2, "class", "notification-message s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(div2, file, 1403, 16, 54534);
			attr_dev(div3, "class", "notification-content s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(div3, file, 1396, 12, 54134);
			attr_dev(div4, "class", "notification-progress s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			set_style(div4, "box-shadow", "0 0 8px rgba(" + parseInt(/*themeColor*/ ctx[8].substring(0, 2), 16) + ", " + parseInt(/*themeColor*/ ctx[8].substring(2, 4), 16) + ", " + parseInt(/*themeColor*/ ctx[8].substring(4, 6), 16) + ", 0.6)");
			add_location(div4, file, 1405, 12, 54630);
			attr_dev(div5, "class", div5_class_value = "notification " + /*notification*/ ctx[66].type + " s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			set_style(div5, "--theme-color", "#" + /*themeColor*/ ctx[8]);
			set_style(div5, "--menu-color", parseInt(/*themeColor*/ ctx[8].substring(0, 2), 16) + ", " + parseInt(/*themeColor*/ ctx[8].substring(2, 4), 16) + ", " + parseInt(/*themeColor*/ ctx[8].substring(4, 6), 16));
			add_location(div5, file, 1360, 8, 51439);
			this.first = div5;
		},
		m: function mount(target, anchor) {
			insert_dev(target, div5, anchor);
			append_dev(div5, div0);
			if (if_block0) if_block0.m(div0, null);
			append_dev(div0, t0);
			if (if_block1) if_block1.m(div0, null);
			append_dev(div0, t1);
			if (if_block2) if_block2.m(div0, null);
			append_dev(div0, t2);
			if (if_block3) if_block3.m(div0, null);
			append_dev(div5, t3);
			append_dev(div5, div3);
			append_dev(div3, div1);
			if (if_block4) if_block4.m(div1, null);
			append_dev(div1, t4);
			if (if_block5) if_block5.m(div1, null);
			append_dev(div1, t5);
			if (if_block6) if_block6.m(div1, null);
			append_dev(div1, t6);
			if (if_block7) if_block7.m(div1, null);
			append_dev(div3, t7);
			append_dev(div3, div2);
			append_dev(div2, t8);
			append_dev(div5, t9);
			append_dev(div5, div4);
			append_dev(div5, t10);
			current = true;
		},
		p: function update(new_ctx, dirty) {
			ctx = new_ctx;

			if (/*notification*/ ctx[66].type === 'success') {
				if (if_block0) {
					
				} else {
					if_block0 = create_if_block_23(ctx);
					if_block0.c();
					if_block0.m(div0, t0);
				}
			} else if (if_block0) {
				if_block0.d(1);
				if_block0 = null;
			}

			if (/*notification*/ ctx[66].type === 'error') {
				if (if_block1) {
					
				} else {
					if_block1 = create_if_block_22(ctx);
					if_block1.c();
					if_block1.m(div0, t1);
				}
			} else if (if_block1) {
				if_block1.d(1);
				if_block1 = null;
			}

			if (/*notification*/ ctx[66].type === 'info') {
				if (if_block2) {
					
				} else {
					if_block2 = create_if_block_21(ctx);
					if_block2.c();
					if_block2.m(div0, t2);
				}
			} else if (if_block2) {
				if_block2.d(1);
				if_block2 = null;
			}

			if (/*notification*/ ctx[66].type === 'warning') {
				if (if_block3) {
					
				} else {
					if_block3 = create_if_block_20(ctx);
					if_block3.c();
					if_block3.m(div0, null);
				}
			} else if (if_block3) {
				if_block3.d(1);
				if_block3 = null;
			}

			if (!current || dirty[0] & /*themeColor*/ 256) {
				set_style(div0, "background", "linear-gradient(135deg, #" + /*themeColor*/ ctx[8] + " 0%, #" + /*themeColor*/ ctx[8] + " 100%)");
			}

			if (!current || dirty[0] & /*themeColor*/ 256) {
				set_style(div0, "box-shadow", "0 0 15px rgba(" + parseInt(/*themeColor*/ ctx[8].substring(0, 2), 16) + ", " + parseInt(/*themeColor*/ ctx[8].substring(2, 4), 16) + ", " + parseInt(/*themeColor*/ ctx[8].substring(4, 6), 16) + ", 0.5)");
			}

			if (/*notification*/ ctx[66].type === 'success') {
				if (if_block4) {
					
				} else {
					if_block4 = create_if_block_19(ctx);
					if_block4.c();
					if_block4.m(div1, t4);
				}
			} else if (if_block4) {
				if_block4.d(1);
				if_block4 = null;
			}

			if (/*notification*/ ctx[66].type === 'error') {
				if (if_block5) {
					
				} else {
					if_block5 = create_if_block_18(ctx);
					if_block5.c();
					if_block5.m(div1, t5);
				}
			} else if (if_block5) {
				if_block5.d(1);
				if_block5 = null;
			}

			if (/*notification*/ ctx[66].type === 'info') {
				if (if_block6) {
					
				} else {
					if_block6 = create_if_block_17(ctx);
					if_block6.c();
					if_block6.m(div1, t6);
				}
			} else if (if_block6) {
				if_block6.d(1);
				if_block6 = null;
			}

			if (/*notification*/ ctx[66].type === 'warning') {
				if (if_block7) {
					
				} else {
					if_block7 = create_if_block_16(ctx);
					if_block7.c();
					if_block7.m(div1, null);
				}
			} else if (if_block7) {
				if_block7.d(1);
				if_block7 = null;
			}

			if ((!current || dirty[0] & /*notifications*/ 131072) && t8_value !== (t8_value = /*notification*/ ctx[66].message + "")) set_data_dev(t8, t8_value);

			if (!current || dirty[0] & /*themeColor*/ 256) {
				set_style(div4, "box-shadow", "0 0 8px rgba(" + parseInt(/*themeColor*/ ctx[8].substring(0, 2), 16) + ", " + parseInt(/*themeColor*/ ctx[8].substring(2, 4), 16) + ", " + parseInt(/*themeColor*/ ctx[8].substring(4, 6), 16) + ", 0.6)");
			}

			if (!current || dirty[0] & /*notifications*/ 131072 && div5_class_value !== (div5_class_value = "notification " + /*notification*/ ctx[66].type + " s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl")) {
				attr_dev(div5, "class", div5_class_value);
			}

			if (!current || dirty[0] & /*themeColor*/ 256) {
				set_style(div5, "--theme-color", "#" + /*themeColor*/ ctx[8]);
			}

			if (!current || dirty[0] & /*themeColor*/ 256) {
				set_style(div5, "--menu-color", parseInt(/*themeColor*/ ctx[8].substring(0, 2), 16) + ", " + parseInt(/*themeColor*/ ctx[8].substring(2, 4), 16) + ", " + parseInt(/*themeColor*/ ctx[8].substring(4, 6), 16));
			}
		},
		i: function intro(local) {
			if (current) return;

			if (local) {
				add_render_callback(() => {
					if (!current) return;
					if (div5_outro) div5_outro.end(1);
					div5_intro = create_in_transition(div5, fly, { x: -400, duration: 500, easing: cubicOut });
					div5_intro.start();
				});
			}

			current = true;
		},
		o: function outro(local) {
			if (div5_intro) div5_intro.invalidate();

			if (local) {
				div5_outro = create_out_transition(div5, fly, { x: -400, duration: 400, easing: cubicOut });
			}

			current = false;
		},
		d: function destroy(detaching) {
			if (detaching) {
				detach_dev(div5);
			}

			if (if_block0) if_block0.d();
			if (if_block1) if_block1.d();
			if (if_block2) if_block2.d();
			if (if_block3) if_block3.d();
			if (if_block4) if_block4.d();
			if (if_block5) if_block5.d();
			if (if_block6) if_block6.d();
			if (if_block7) if_block7.d();
			if (detaching && div5_outro) div5_outro.end();
		}
	};

	dispatch_dev("SvelteRegisterBlock", {
		block,
		id: create_each_block_3.name,
		type: "each",
		source: "(1361:4) {#each notifications as notification (notification.id)}",
		ctx
	});

	return block;
}

// (1415:0) {#if showAntiCheatOverlay}
function create_if_block_12(ctx) {
	let div3;
	let div1;
	let svg;
	let path;
	let t0;
	let div0;
	let t2;
	let div2;
	let div3_intro;
	let div3_outro;
	let current;

	function select_block_type(ctx, dirty) {
		if (/*overlayStatus*/ ctx[19] === 'searching') return create_if_block_13;
		return create_else_block_2;
	}

	let current_block_type = select_block_type(ctx, [-1, -1, -1]);
	let if_block = current_block_type(ctx);

	const block = {
		c: function create() {
			div3 = element("div");
			div1 = element("div");
			svg = svg_element("svg");
			path = svg_element("path");
			t0 = space();
			div0 = element("div");
			div0.textContent = "Anti-Cheat Scanner";
			t2 = space();
			div2 = element("div");
			if_block.c();
			attr_dev(path, "d", "M22 19a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H4a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V5a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h5l2 3h9a2 2 0 0 1 2 2z");
			attr_dev(path, "class", "s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(path, file, 1422, 16, 55431);
			attr_dev(svg, "class", "scan-icon s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			attr_dev(svg, "xmlns", "http://www.w3.org/2000/svg");
			attr_dev(svg, "viewBox", "0 0 24 24");
			attr_dev(svg, "fill", "none");
			attr_dev(svg, "stroke", "currentColor");
			attr_dev(svg, "stroke-width", "2");
			attr_dev(svg, "stroke-linecap", "round");
			attr_dev(svg, "stroke-linejoin", "round");
			add_location(svg, file, 1421, 12, 55237);
			attr_dev(div0, "class", "anticheat-title s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(div0, file, 1424, 12, 55552);
			attr_dev(div1, "class", "anticheat-header s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(div1, file, 1420, 8, 55193);
			attr_dev(div2, "class", "anticheat-body s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(div2, file, 1426, 8, 55631);
			attr_dev(div3, "class", "anticheat-overlay s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			set_style(div3, "--theme-color", "#" + /*themeColor*/ ctx[8]);
			add_location(div3, file, 1414, 4, 54961);
		},
		m: function mount(target, anchor) {
			insert_dev(target, div3, anchor);
			append_dev(div3, div1);
			append_dev(div1, svg);
			append_dev(svg, path);
			append_dev(div1, t0);
			append_dev(div1, div0);
			append_dev(div3, t2);
			append_dev(div3, div2);
			if_block.m(div2, null);
			current = true;
		},
		p: function update(ctx, dirty) {
			if (current_block_type === (current_block_type = select_block_type(ctx, dirty)) && if_block) {
				if_block.p(ctx, dirty);
			} else {
				if_block.d(1);
				if_block = current_block_type(ctx);

				if (if_block) {
					if_block.c();
					if_block.m(div2, null);
				}
			}

			if (!current || dirty[0] & /*themeColor*/ 256) {
				set_style(div3, "--theme-color", "#" + /*themeColor*/ ctx[8]);
			}
		},
		i: function intro(local) {
			if (current) return;

			if (local) {
				add_render_callback(() => {
					if (!current) return;
					if (div3_outro) div3_outro.end(1);
					div3_intro = create_in_transition(div3, fly, { y: -100, duration: 300, easing: cubicOut });
					div3_intro.start();
				});
			}

			current = true;
		},
		o: function outro(local) {
			if (div3_intro) div3_intro.invalidate();

			if (local) {
				div3_outro = create_out_transition(div3, fly, { y: -100, duration: 300, easing: cubicOut });
			}

			current = false;
		},
		d: function destroy(detaching) {
			if (detaching) {
				detach_dev(div3);
			}

			if_block.d();
			if (detaching && div3_outro) div3_outro.end();
		}
	};

	dispatch_dev("SvelteRegisterBlock", {
		block,
		id: create_if_block_12.name,
		type: "if",
		source: "(1415:0) {#if showAntiCheatOverlay}",
		ctx
	});

	return block;
}

// (1433:12) {:else}
function create_else_block_2(ctx) {
	let div0;
	let t0;
	let t1;
	let div1;
	let span0;
	let t3;
	let span1;
	let t4;
	let div2;
	let span2;
	let t6;
	let span3;
	let t7;

	function select_block_type_1(ctx, dirty) {
		if (/*overlayStatus*/ ctx[19] === 'clean') return create_if_block_14;
		if (/*overlayStatus*/ ctx[19] === 'detected') return create_if_block_15;
	}

	let current_block_type = select_block_type_1(ctx, [-1, -1, -1]);
	let if_block = current_block_type && current_block_type(ctx);

	const block = {
		c: function create() {
			div0 = element("div");
			t0 = text(/*overlayMessage*/ ctx[20]);
			t1 = space();
			div1 = element("div");
			span0 = element("span");
			span0.textContent = "Status";
			t3 = space();
			span1 = element("span");
			if (if_block) if_block.c();
			t4 = space();
			div2 = element("div");
			span2 = element("span");
			span2.textContent = "AC Found";
			t6 = space();
			span3 = element("span");
			t7 = text(/*detectedCount*/ ctx[21]);
			attr_dev(div0, "class", "scan-message s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(div0, file, 1432, 16, 55853);
			attr_dev(span0, "class", "scan-label s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(span0, file, 1436, 20, 56004);
			attr_dev(span1, "class", "scan-value s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(span1, file, 1437, 20, 56064);
			attr_dev(div1, "class", "scan-item s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(div1, file, 1435, 16, 55959);
			attr_dev(span2, "class", "scan-label s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(span2, file, 1442, 20, 56319);
			attr_dev(span3, "class", "scan-value s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(span3, file, 1443, 20, 56381);
			attr_dev(div2, "class", "scan-item s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(div2, file, 1441, 16, 56274);
		},
		m: function mount(target, anchor) {
			insert_dev(target, div0, anchor);
			append_dev(div0, t0);
			insert_dev(target, t1, anchor);
			insert_dev(target, div1, anchor);
			append_dev(div1, span0);
			append_dev(div1, t3);
			append_dev(div1, span1);
			if (if_block) if_block.m(span1, null);
			insert_dev(target, t4, anchor);
			insert_dev(target, div2, anchor);
			append_dev(div2, span2);
			append_dev(div2, t6);
			append_dev(div2, span3);
			append_dev(span3, t7);
		},
		p: function update(ctx, dirty) {
			if (dirty[0] & /*overlayMessage*/ 1048576) set_data_dev(t0, /*overlayMessage*/ ctx[20]);

			if (current_block_type !== (current_block_type = select_block_type_1(ctx, dirty))) {
				if (if_block) if_block.d(1);
				if_block = current_block_type && current_block_type(ctx);

				if (if_block) {
					if_block.c();
					if_block.m(span1, null);
				}
			}

			if (dirty[0] & /*detectedCount*/ 2097152) set_data_dev(t7, /*detectedCount*/ ctx[21]);
		},
		d: function destroy(detaching) {
			if (detaching) {
				detach_dev(div0);
				detach_dev(t1);
				detach_dev(div1);
				detach_dev(t4);
				detach_dev(div2);
			}

			if (if_block) {
				if_block.d();
			}
		}
	};

	dispatch_dev("SvelteRegisterBlock", {
		block,
		id: create_else_block_2.name,
		type: "else",
		source: "(1433:12) {:else}",
		ctx
	});

	return block;
}

// (1452:0) {#if showSpectatorList}
function create_if_block_10(ctx) {
	let div3;
	let div1;
	let svg;
	let path;
	let circle;
	let t0;
	let div0;
	let t2;
	let div2;
	let div3_intro;
	let div3_outro;
	let current;

	function select_block_type_2(ctx, dirty) {
		if (/*spectatorList*/ ctx[15].length > 0) return create_if_block_11;
		return create_else_block_1;
	}

	let current_block_type = select_block_type_2(ctx, [-1, -1, -1]);
	let if_block = current_block_type(ctx);

	const block = {
		c: function create() {
			div3 = element("div");
			div1 = element("div");
			svg = svg_element("svg");
			path = svg_element("path");

			attr_dev(svg, "fill", "none");
			attr_dev(svg, "stroke", "currentColor");
			attr_dev(svg, "stroke-width", "2");
			attr_dev(svg, "stroke-linecap", "round");
			attr_dev(svg, "stroke-linejoin", "round");
			add_location(svg, file, 1458, 12, 56822);
			attr_dev(div0, "class", "spectator-title s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(div0, file, 1462, 12, 57178);
			attr_dev(div1, "class", "spectator-header s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(div1, file, 1457, 8, 56778);
			attr_dev(div2, "class", "spectator-list s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(div2, file, 1464, 8, 57249);
			attr_dev(div3, "class", "spectator-list-container s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			set_style(div3, "--theme-color", "#" + /*themeColor*/ ctx[8]);
			add_location(div3, file, 1451, 4, 56539);
		},
		m: function mount(target, anchor) {
			insert_dev(target, div3, anchor);
			append_dev(div3, div1);
			append_dev(div1, svg);
			append_dev(svg, path);
			append_dev(svg, circle);
			append_dev(div1, t0);
			append_dev(div1, div0);
			append_dev(div3, t2);
			append_dev(div3, div2);
			if_block.m(div2, null);
			current = true;
		},
		p: function update(ctx, dirty) {
			if (current_block_type === (current_block_type = select_block_type_2(ctx, dirty)) && if_block) {
				if_block.p(ctx, dirty);
			} else {
				if_block.d(1);
				if_block = current_block_type(ctx);

				if (if_block) {
					if_block.c();
					if_block.m(div2, null);
				}
			}

			if (!current || dirty[0] & /*themeColor*/ 256) {
				set_style(div3, "--theme-color", "#" + /*themeColor*/ ctx[8]);
			}
		},
		i: function intro(local) {
			if (current) return;

			if (local) {
				add_render_callback(() => {
					if (!current) return;
					if (div3_outro) div3_outro.end(1);
					div3_intro = create_in_transition(div3, fly, { x: -100, duration: 300, easing: cubicOut });
					div3_intro.start();
				});
			}

			current = true;
		},
		o: function outro(local) {
			if (div3_intro) div3_intro.invalidate();

			if (local) {
				div3_outro = create_out_transition(div3, fly, { x: -100, duration: 300, easing: cubicOut });
			}

			current = false;
		},
		d: function destroy(detaching) {
			if (detaching) {
				detach_dev(div3);
			}

			if_block.d();
			if (detaching && div3_outro) div3_outro.end();
		}
	};

	dispatch_dev("SvelteRegisterBlock", {
		block,
		id: create_if_block_10.name,
		type: "if",
		source: "(1452:0) {#if showSpectatorList}",
		ctx
	});

	return block;
}

// (1474:12) {:else}

			attr_dev(div, "class", "no-spectators s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(div, file, 1473, 16, 57732);
		},

			insert_dev(target, div, anchor);
		},
		p: noop,
		d: function destroy(detaching) {
			if (detaching) {
				detach_dev(div);
			}
		}
	};

	dispatch_dev("SvelteRegisterBlock", {
		block,
		id: create_else_block_1.name,
		type: "else",

		ctx
	});

	return block;

// (1467:12) {#if spectatorList.length > 0}
function create_if_block_11(ctx) {
	let each_blocks = [];
	let each_1_lookup = new Map();
	let each_1_anchor;
	let each_value_2 = ensure_array_like_dev(/*spectatorList*/ ctx[15]);
	const get_key = ctx => /*spectator*/ ctx[64].name;
	validate_each_keys(ctx, each_value_2, get_each_context_2, get_key);

	for (let i = 0; i < each_value_2.length; i += 1) {
		let child_ctx = get_each_context_2(ctx, each_value_2, i);
		let key = get_key(child_ctx);
		each_1_lookup.set(key, each_blocks[i] = create_each_block_2(key, child_ctx));
	}

	const block = {
		c: function create() {
			for (let i = 0; i < each_blocks.length; i += 1) {
				each_blocks[i].c();
			}

			each_1_anchor = empty();
		},
		m: function mount(target, anchor) {
			for (let i = 0; i < each_blocks.length; i += 1) {
				if (each_blocks[i]) {
					each_blocks[i].m(target, anchor);
				}
			}

			insert_dev(target, each_1_anchor, anchor);
		},
		p: function update(ctx, dirty) {
			if (dirty[0] & /*spectatorList*/ 32768) {
				each_value_2 = ensure_array_like_dev(/*spectatorList*/ ctx[15]);
				validate_each_keys(ctx, each_value_2, get_each_context_2, get_key);
				each_blocks = update_keyed_each(each_blocks, dirty, get_key, 1, ctx, each_value_2, each_1_lookup, each_1_anchor.parentNode, destroy_block, create_each_block_2, each_1_anchor, get_each_context_2);
			}
		},
		d: function destroy(detaching) {
			if (detaching) {
				detach_dev(each_1_anchor);
			}

			for (let i = 0; i < each_blocks.length; i += 1) {
				each_blocks[i].d(detaching);
			}
		}
	};

	dispatch_dev("SvelteRegisterBlock", {
		block,
		id: create_if_block_11.name,
		type: "if",
		source: "(1467:12) {#if spectatorList.length > 0}",
		ctx
	});

	return block;
}

// (1468:16) {#each spectatorList as spectator, index (spectator.name)}
function create_each_block_2(key_1, ctx) {
	let div;
	let span0;
	let t0_value = /*spectator*/ ctx[64].name + "";
	let t0;
	let t1;
	let span1;
	let t2_value = /*spectator*/ ctx[64].distance + "";
	let t2;
	let t3;
	let t4;
	let div_intro;

	const block = {
		key: key_1,
		first: null,
		c: function create() {
			div = element("div");
			span0 = element("span");
			t0 = text(t0_value);
			t1 = space();
			span1 = element("span");
			t2 = text(t2_value);
			t3 = text("m");
			t4 = space();
			attr_dev(span0, "class", "spectator-name s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(span0, file, 1468, 24, 57501);
			attr_dev(span1, "class", "spectator-distance s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(span1, file, 1469, 24, 57579);
			attr_dev(div, "class", "spectator-item s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(div, file, 1467, 20, 57419);
			this.first = div;
		},
		m: function mount(target, anchor) {
			insert_dev(target, div, anchor);
			append_dev(div, span0);
			append_dev(span0, t0);
			append_dev(div, t1);
			append_dev(div, span1);
			append_dev(span1, t2);
			append_dev(span1, t3);
			append_dev(div, t4);
		},
		p: function update(new_ctx, dirty) {
			ctx = new_ctx;
			if (dirty[0] & /*spectatorList*/ 32768 && t0_value !== (t0_value = /*spectator*/ ctx[64].name + "")) set_data_dev(t0, t0_value);
			if (dirty[0] & /*spectatorList*/ 32768 && t2_value !== (t2_value = /*spectator*/ ctx[64].distance + "")) set_data_dev(t2, t2_value);
		},
		i: function intro(local) {
			if (local) {
				if (!div_intro) {
					add_render_callback(() => {
						div_intro = create_in_transition(div, fade, { duration: 200 });
						div_intro.start();
					});
				}
			}
		},
		o: noop,
		d: function destroy(detaching) {
			if (detaching) {
				detach_dev(div);
			}
		}
	};

	dispatch_dev("SvelteRegisterBlock", {
		block,
		id: create_each_block_2.name,
		type: "each",
		source: "(1468:16) {#each spectatorList as spectator, index (spectator.name)}",
		ctx
	});

	return block;
}

// (1481:0) {#if showing}
function create_if_block_1(ctx) {
	let div8;
	let t0;
	let div1;
	let div0;
	let t1;
	let div7;
	let div2;
	let img0;
	let img0_src_value;
	let t2;
	let div4;
	let div3;
	let each_blocks = [];
	let each_1_lookup = new Map();
	let t3;
	let div6;
	let div5;
	let img1;
	let img1_src_value;
	let t4;
	let span0;
	let t6;
	let span1;

	let t7_value = (/*selectableMenu*/ ctx[3].length
	? /*counterCurrent*/ ctx[25]()
	: 0) + "";

	let t7;
	let t8;
	let t9_value = /*selectableMenu*/ ctx[3].length + "";
	let t9;
	let div8_intro;
	let div8_outro;
	let current;
	let mounted;
	let dispose;
	let if_block = /*currentWeaponImage*/ ctx[22] && create_if_block_9(ctx);
	let each_value = ensure_array_like_dev(/*activeMenu*/ ctx[1]);
	const get_key = ctx => /*option*/ ctx[58].label;
	validate_each_keys(ctx, each_value, get_each_context, get_key);

	for (let i = 0; i < each_value.length; i += 1) {
		let child_ctx = get_each_context(ctx, each_value, i);
		let key = get_key(child_ctx);
		each_1_lookup.set(key, each_blocks[i] = create_each_block(key, child_ctx));
	}

	const block = {
		c: function create() {
			div8 = element("div");
			if (if_block) if_block.c();
			t0 = space();
			div1 = element("div");
			div0 = element("div");
			t1 = space();
			div7 = element("div");
			div2 = element("div");
			img0 = element("img");
			t2 = space();
			div4 = element("div");
			div3 = element("div");

			for (let i = 0; i < each_blocks.length; i += 1) {
				each_blocks[i].c();
			}

			t3 = space();
			div6 = element("div");
			div5 = element("div");
			img1 = element("img");
			t4 = space();
			span0 = element("span");
			span0.textContent = "ricomenuvip.com";
			t6 = space();
			span1 = element("span");
			t7 = text(t7_value);
			t8 = text(" | ");
			t9 = text(t9_value);
			attr_dev(div0, "class", "scrollbar-thumb s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			set_style(div0, "top", /*thumbTop*/ ctx[13] + "px");
			set_style(div0, "height", /*thumbHeight*/ ctx[14] + "px");
			add_location(div0, file, 1488, 12, 58609);
			attr_dev(div1, "class", "scrollbar-container s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			set_style(div1, "top", /*trackTop*/ ctx[11] + "px");
			set_style(div1, "height", /*trackHeight*/ ctx[12] + "px");
			add_location(div1, file, 1487, 8, 58512);
			if (!src_url_equal(img0.src, img0_src_value = /*banner*/ ctx[6])) attr_dev(img0, "src", img0_src_value);
			attr_dev(img0, "alt", "Banner");
			set_style(img0, "display", "block");
			set_style(img0, "width", "100%");
			set_style(img0, "height", "9.5vh");
			set_style(img0, "object-fit", "cover");
			set_style(img0, "margin", "0");
			set_style(img0, "padding", "0");
			set_style(img0, "border", "0");
			attr_dev(img0, "class", "s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(img0, file, 1494, 16, 58989);
			set_style(div2, "width", "100%");
			set_style(div2, "overflow", "hidden");
			set_style(div2, "line-height", "0");
			attr_dev(div2, "class", "s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(div2, file, 1493, 12, 58911);
			set_style(div3, "display", "flex");
			set_style(div3, "flex-direction", "column");
			set_style(div3, "gap", "0vh");
			set_style(div3, "position", "relative");
			attr_dev(div3, "class", "s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(div3, file, 1498, 16, 59316);
			attr_dev(div4, "class", "hide-scrollbar s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			set_style(div4, "max-height", "33.6vh");
			set_style(div4, "background", "rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.6)");
			add_location(div4, file, 1497, 12, 59163);
			if (!src_url_equal(img1.src, img1_src_value = "https://i.ibb.co/fGXLfjrD/17-2.png")) attr_dev(img1, "src", img1_src_value);
			set_style(img1, "width", "0.9vh");
			set_style(img1, "height", "0.9vh");

			set_style(img1, "filter", "brightness(0) saturate(100%) invert(100%)");

			add_location(span0, file, 1557, 20, 63858);

			add_location(div5, file, 1555, 16, 63585);
			set_style(span1, "color", "rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6)");
			set_style(span1, "font-weight", "500");
			set_style(span1, "font-size", "0.9vh");
			attr_dev(span1, "class", "s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(span1, file, 1559, 16, 64012);
			set_style(div6, "background", "#000");
			set_style(div6, "padding", "0.8vh 1.2vh");
			set_style(div6, "font-size", "1.1vh");

			set_style(div6, "align-items", "center");
			attr_dev(div6, "class", "s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(div6, file, 1554, 12, 63412);
			set_style(div7, "margin-left", "1.75vh");
			set_style(div7, "width", "33.5vh");
			set_style(div7, "background", "rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.85)");
			set_style(div7, "border-radius", "0.6vh");
			set_style(div7, "overflow", "hidden");
			set_style(div7, "box-shadow", "0 4px 15px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5)");
			attr_dev(div7, "class", "s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(div7, file, 1491, 8, 58718);
			set_style(div8, "--theme-color", "#" + /*themeColor*/ ctx[8]);
			set_style(div8, "--menu-color", parseInt(/*themeColor*/ ctx[8].substring(0, 2), 16) + ", " + parseInt(/*themeColor*/ ctx[8].substring(2, 4), 16) + ", " + parseInt(/*themeColor*/ ctx[8].substring(4, 6), 16));
			set_style(div8, "position", "absolute");
			set_style(div8, "top", "50%");
			set_style(div8, "transform", "translateY(-50%)");
			set_style(div8, "right", "6.5vh");
			set_style(div8, "font-family", "'Inter', sans-serif");
			attr_dev(div8, "class", "s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(div8, file, 1480, 4, 57862);
		},
		m: function mount(target, anchor) {
			insert_dev(target, div8, anchor);
			if (if_block) if_block.m(div8, null);
			append_dev(div8, t0);
			append_dev(div8, div1);
			append_dev(div1, div0);
			append_dev(div8, t1);
			append_dev(div8, div7);
			append_dev(div7, div2);
			append_dev(div2, img0);
			append_dev(div7, t2);
			append_dev(div7, div4);
			append_dev(div4, div3);

			for (let i = 0; i < each_blocks.length; i += 1) {
				if (each_blocks[i]) {
					each_blocks[i].m(div3, null);
				}
			}

			/*div4_binding*/ ctx[31](div4);
			append_dev(div7, t3);
			append_dev(div7, div6);
			append_dev(div6, div5);
			append_dev(div5, img1);
			append_dev(div5, t4);
			append_dev(div5, span0);
			append_dev(div6, t6);
			append_dev(div6, span1);
			append_dev(span1, t7);
			append_dev(span1, t8);
			append_dev(span1, t9);
			/*div8_binding*/ ctx[32](div8);
			current = true;

			if (!mounted) {
				dispose = listen_dev(div4, "scroll", /*onListScroll*/ ctx[26], false, false, false, false);
				mounted = true;
			}
		},
		p: function update(ctx, dirty) {
			if (/*currentWeaponImage*/ ctx[22]) {
				if (if_block) {
					if_block.p(ctx, dirty);

					if (dirty[0] & /*currentWeaponImage*/ 4194304) {
						transition_in(if_block, 1);
					}
				} else {
					if_block = create_if_block_9(ctx);
					if_block.c();
					transition_in(if_block, 1);
					if_block.m(div8, t0);
				}
			} else if (if_block) {
				group_outros();

				transition_out(if_block, 1, 1, () => {
					if_block = null;
				});

				check_outros();
			}

			if (!current || dirty[0] & /*thumbTop*/ 8192) {
				set_style(div0, "top", /*thumbTop*/ ctx[13] + "px");
			}

			if (!current || dirty[0] & /*thumbHeight*/ 16384) {
				set_style(div0, "height", /*thumbHeight*/ ctx[14] + "px");
			}

			if (!current || dirty[0] & /*trackTop*/ 2048) {
				set_style(div1, "top", /*trackTop*/ ctx[11] + "px");
			}

			if (!current || dirty[0] & /*trackHeight*/ 4096) {
				set_style(div1, "height", /*trackHeight*/ ctx[12] + "px");
			}

			if (!current || dirty[0] & /*banner*/ 64 && !src_url_equal(img0.src, img0_src_value = /*banner*/ ctx[6])) {
				attr_dev(img0, "src", img0_src_value);
			}

			if (dirty[0] & /*activeMenu, current, itemRefs, changeBanner, banners, currentBannerIndex*/ 25165987) {
				each_value = ensure_array_like_dev(/*activeMenu*/ ctx[1]);
				validate_each_keys(ctx, each_value, get_each_context, get_key);
				each_blocks = update_keyed_each(each_blocks, dirty, get_key, 1, ctx, each_value, each_1_lookup, div3, destroy_block, create_each_block, null, get_each_context);
			}

			if ((!current || dirty[0] & /*selectableMenu*/ 8) && t7_value !== (t7_value = (/*selectableMenu*/ ctx[3].length
			? /*counterCurrent*/ ctx[25]()
			: 0) + "")) set_data_dev(t7, t7_value);

			if ((!current || dirty[0] & /*selectableMenu*/ 8) && t9_value !== (t9_value = /*selectableMenu*/ ctx[3].length + "")) set_data_dev(t9, t9_value);

			if (!current || dirty[0] & /*themeColor*/ 256) {
				set_style(div8, "--theme-color", "#" + /*themeColor*/ ctx[8]);
			}

			if (!current || dirty[0] & /*themeColor*/ 256) {
				set_style(div8, "--menu-color", parseInt(/*themeColor*/ ctx[8].substring(0, 2), 16) + ", " + parseInt(/*themeColor*/ ctx[8].substring(2, 4), 16) + ", " + parseInt(/*themeColor*/ ctx[8].substring(4, 6), 16));
			}
		},
		i: function intro(local) {
			if (current) return;
			transition_in(if_block);

			if (local) {
				add_render_callback(() => {
					if (!current) return;
					if (div8_outro) div8_outro.end(1);
					div8_intro = create_in_transition(div8, fade, { duration: 200 });
					div8_intro.start();
				});
			}

			current = true;
		},
		o: function outro(local) {
			transition_out(if_block);
			if (div8_intro) div8_intro.invalidate();

			if (local) {
				div8_outro = create_out_transition(div8, fade, { duration: 200 });
			}

			current = false;
		},
		d: function destroy(detaching) {
			if (detaching) {
				detach_dev(div8);
			}

			if (if_block) if_block.d();

			for (let i = 0; i < each_blocks.length; i += 1) {
				each_blocks[i].d();
			}

			/*div4_binding*/ ctx[31](null);
			/*div8_binding*/ ctx[32](null);
			if (detaching && div8_outro) div8_outro.end();
			mounted = false;
			dispose();
		}
	};

	dispatch_dev("SvelteRegisterBlock", {
		block,
		id: create_if_block_1.name,
		type: "if",
		source: "(1481:0) {#if showing}",
		ctx
	});

	return block;
}

// (1483:8) {#if currentWeaponImage}
function create_if_block_9(ctx) {
	let div;
	let img;
	let img_src_value;
	let div_intro;
	let div_outro;
	let current;

	const block = {
		c: function create() {
			div = element("div");
			img = element("img");
			if (!src_url_equal(img.src, img_src_value = /*currentWeaponImage*/ ctx[22])) attr_dev(img, "src", img_src_value);
			attr_dev(img, "alt", "Weapon Image");
			attr_dev(img, "class", "weapon-image s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(img, file, 1483, 16, 58393);
			attr_dev(div, "class", "weapon-image-container s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(div, file, 1482, 12, 58282);
		},
		m: function mount(target, anchor) {
			insert_dev(target, div, anchor);
			append_dev(div, img);
			current = true;
		},
		p: function update(ctx, dirty) {
			if (!current || dirty[0] & /*currentWeaponImage*/ 4194304 && !src_url_equal(img.src, img_src_value = /*currentWeaponImage*/ ctx[22])) {
				attr_dev(img, "src", img_src_value);
			}
		},
		i: function intro(local) {
			if (current) return;

			if (local) {
				add_render_callback(() => {
					if (!current) return;
					if (div_outro) div_outro.end(1);
					div_intro = create_in_transition(div, fade, { duration: 200 });
					div_intro.start();
				});
			}

			current = true;
		},
		o: function outro(local) {
			if (div_intro) div_intro.invalidate();

			if (local) {
				div_outro = create_out_transition(div, fade, { duration: 200 });
			}

			current = false;
		},
		d: function destroy(detaching) {
			if (detaching) {
				detach_dev(div);
			}

			if (detaching && div_outro) div_outro.end();
		}
	};

	dispatch_dev("SvelteRegisterBlock", {
		block,
		id: create_if_block_9.name,
		type: "if",
		source: "(1483:8) {#if currentWeaponImage}",
		ctx
	});

	return block;
}

// (1506:24) {:else}
function create_else_block(ctx) {
	let div1;
	let div0;
	let t0;
	let span;
	let t1_value = /*option*/ ctx[58].label + "";
	let t1;
	let t2;
	let t3;
	let div1_class_value;
	let index = /*index*/ ctx[60];
	let if_block0 = /*option*/ ctx[58].icon && create_if_block_8(ctx);

	function select_block_type_4(ctx, dirty) {
		if (/*option*/ ctx[58].type == 'submenu') return create_if_block_3;
		if (/*option*/ ctx[58].type == 'banner-slider') return create_if_block_4;
		if (/*option*/ ctx[58].type == 'checkbox') return create_if_block_5;
		if (/*option*/ ctx[58].type == 'slider') return create_if_block_6;
		if (/*option*/ ctx[58].type == 'scroll') return create_if_block_7;
	}

	let current_block_type = select_block_type_4(ctx, [-1, -1, -1]);
	let if_block1 = current_block_type && current_block_type(ctx);
	const assign_div1 = () => /*div1_binding*/ ctx[30](div1, index);
	const unassign_div1 = () => /*div1_binding*/ ctx[30](null, index);

	const block = {
		c: function create() {
			div1 = element("div");
			div0 = element("div");
			if (if_block0) if_block0.c();
			t0 = space();
			span = element("span");
			t1 = text(t1_value);
			t2 = space();
			if (if_block1) if_block1.c();
			t3 = space();
			set_style(span, "flex-grow", "1");
			set_style(span, "text-align", "left");
			set_style(span, "font-size", "1.2vh");
			set_style(span, "height", "100%");
			attr_dev(span, "class", "s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(span, file, 1514, 36, 60518);
			set_style(div0, "display", "flex");
			set_style(div0, "align-items", "center");
			set_style(div0, "flex-grow", "1");
			attr_dev(div0, "class", "s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(div0, file, 1510, 32, 60235);
			attr_dev(div1, "class", div1_class_value = "menu-item " + (/*index*/ ctx[60] == /*current*/ ctx[0] ? 'active' : '') + " s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			set_style(div1, "padding", "0.7vh 1.0vh");
			set_style(div1, "color", "white");
			set_style(div1, "border-radius", "0.3vh");
			set_style(div1, "justify-content", "space-between");
			set_style(div1, "display", "flex");
			set_style(div1, "align-items", "center");
			set_style(div1, "font-family", "'Inter', sans-serif");
			set_style(div1, "font-size", "1.2vh");
			set_style(div1, "gap", "1vh");
			set_style(div1, "font-weight", "400");
			set_style(div1, "cursor", "pointer");
			set_style(div1, "z-index", "1");
			add_location(div1, file, 1505, 28, 59743);
		},
		m: function mount(target, anchor) {
			insert_dev(target, div1, anchor);
			append_dev(div1, div0);
			if (if_block0) if_block0.m(div0, null);
			append_dev(div0, t0);
			append_dev(div0, span);
			append_dev(span, t1);
			append_dev(div1, t2);
			if (if_block1) if_block1.m(div1, null);
			append_dev(div1, t3);
			assign_div1();
		},
		p: function update(new_ctx, dirty) {
			ctx = new_ctx;

			if (/*option*/ ctx[58].icon) {
				if (if_block0) {
					if_block0.p(ctx, dirty);
				} else {
					if_block0 = create_if_block_8(ctx);
					if_block0.c();
					if_block0.m(div0, t0);
				}
			} else if (if_block0) {
				if_block0.d(1);
				if_block0 = null;
			}

			if (dirty[0] & /*activeMenu*/ 2 && t1_value !== (t1_value = /*option*/ ctx[58].label + "")) set_data_dev(t1, t1_value);

			if (current_block_type === (current_block_type = select_block_type_4(ctx, dirty)) && if_block1) {
				if_block1.p(ctx, dirty);
			} else {
				if (if_block1) if_block1.d(1);
				if_block1 = current_block_type && current_block_type(ctx);

				if (if_block1) {
					if_block1.c();
					if_block1.m(div1, t3);
				}
			}

			if (dirty[0] & /*activeMenu, current*/ 3 && div1_class_value !== (div1_class_value = "menu-item " + (/*index*/ ctx[60] == /*current*/ ctx[0] ? 'active' : '') + " s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl")) {
				attr_dev(div1, "class", div1_class_value);
			}

			if (index !== /*index*/ ctx[60]) {
				unassign_div1();
				index = /*index*/ ctx[60];
				assign_div1();
			}
		},
		d: function destroy(detaching) {
			if (detaching) {
				detach_dev(div1);
			}

			if (if_block0) if_block0.d();

			if (if_block1) {
				if_block1.d();
			}

			unassign_div1();
		}
	};

	dispatch_dev("SvelteRegisterBlock", {
		block,
		id: create_else_block.name,
		type: "else",
		source: "(1506:24) {:else}",
		ctx
	});

	return block;
}

// (1502:24) {#if option.type === 'divider'}
function create_if_block_2(ctx) {
	let div;
	let span;
	let t0_value = /*option*/ ctx[58].label + "";
	let t0;
	let t1;

	const block = {
		c: function create() {
			div = element("div");
			span = element("span");
			t0 = text(t0_value);
			t1 = space();
			attr_dev(span, "class", "s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(span, file, 1502, 32, 59617);
			attr_dev(div, "class", "menu-divider s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(div, file, 1501, 28, 59557);
		},
		m: function mount(target, anchor) {
			insert_dev(target, div, anchor);
			append_dev(div, span);
			append_dev(span, t0);
			append_dev(div, t1);
		},
		p: function update(ctx, dirty) {
			if (dirty[0] & /*activeMenu*/ 2 && t0_value !== (t0_value = /*option*/ ctx[58].label + "")) set_data_dev(t0, t0_value);
		},
		d: function destroy(detaching) {
			if (detaching) {
				detach_dev(div);
			}
		}
	};

	dispatch_dev("SvelteRegisterBlock", {
		block,
		id: create_if_block_2.name,
		type: "if",
		source: "(1502:24) {#if option.type === 'divider'}",
		ctx
	});

	return block;
}

// (1541:66) 
function create_if_block_7(ctx) {

	let div0;
	let t1;

	let t3;

		c: function create() {
			div2 = element("div");
			div0 = element("div");

		},

			append_dev(div2, div0);

			append_dev(div2, span);
			append_dev(span, t2);
			append_dev(div2, t3);
			append_dev(div2, div1);
		},
		p: function update(ctx, dirty) {
			if (dirty[0] & /*activeMenu*/ 2 && t2_value !== (t2_value = /*option*/ ctx[58].options[/*option*/ ctx[58].selected]?.label + "")) set_data_dev(t2, t2_value);
		},
		d: function destroy(detaching) {
			if (detaching) {
				detach_dev(div2);
			}
		}
	};

	dispatch_dev("SvelteRegisterBlock", {
		block,
		id: create_if_block_7.name,
		type: "if",
		source: "(1541:66) ",
		ctx
	});

// (1539:66) 
function create_if_block_6(ctx) {
	let input;
	let input_min_value;
	let input_max_value;
	let input_step_value;
	let mounted;
	let dispose;

	function input_change_input_handler() {
		/*input_change_input_handler*/ ctx[29].call(input, /*each_value*/ ctx[59], /*index*/ ctx[60]);
	}

	const block = {
		c: function create() {
			input = element("input");
			attr_dev(input, "type", "range");
			attr_dev(input, "class", "range s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			attr_dev(input, "min", input_min_value = /*option*/ ctx[58].min);
			attr_dev(input, "max", input_max_value = /*option*/ ctx[58].max);
			attr_dev(input, "step", input_step_value = /*option*/ ctx[58].step);
			set_style(input, "--pct", /*option*/ ctx[58].value / /*option*/ ctx[58].max * 100 + "%");
			add_location(input, file, 1538, 36, 62206);
		},
		m: function mount(target, anchor) {
			insert_dev(target, input, anchor);
			set_input_value(input, /*option*/ ctx[58].value);

			if (!mounted) {
				dispose = [
					listen_dev(input, "change", input_change_input_handler),
					listen_dev(input, "input", input_change_input_handler)
				];

				mounted = true;
			}
		},
		p: function update(new_ctx, dirty) {
			ctx = new_ctx;

			if (dirty[0] & /*activeMenu*/ 2 && input_min_value !== (input_min_value = /*option*/ ctx[58].min)) {
				attr_dev(input, "min", input_min_value);
			}

			if (dirty[0] & /*activeMenu*/ 2 && input_max_value !== (input_max_value = /*option*/ ctx[58].max)) {
				attr_dev(input, "max", input_max_value);
			}

			if (dirty[0] & /*activeMenu*/ 2 && input_step_value !== (input_step_value = /*option*/ ctx[58].step)) {
				attr_dev(input, "step", input_step_value);
			}

			if (dirty[0] & /*activeMenu*/ 2) {
				set_style(input, "--pct", /*option*/ ctx[58].value / /*option*/ ctx[58].max * 100 + "%");
			}

			if (dirty[0] & /*activeMenu*/ 2) {
				set_input_value(input, /*option*/ ctx[58].value);
			}
		},
		d: function destroy(detaching) {
			if (detaching) {
				detach_dev(input);
			}

			mounted = false;
			run_all(dispose);
		}
	};

	dispatch_dev("SvelteRegisterBlock", {
		block,
		id: create_if_block_6.name,
		type: "if",
		source: "(1539:66) ",
		ctx
	});

	return block;
}

// (1523:73) 
function create_if_block_4(ctx) {
	let div2;
	let span0;
	let t1;
	let div0;
	let t2;
	let span1;
	let t4;
	let div1;
	let span2;
	let t6;
	let span3;
	let mounted;
	let dispose;
	let each_value_1 = ensure_array_like_dev(/*banners*/ ctx[23]);
	let each_blocks = [];

	for (let i = 0; i < each_value_1.length; i += 1) {
		each_blocks[i] = create_each_block_1(get_each_context_1(ctx, each_value_1, i));
	}

	const block = {
		c: function create() {
			div2 = element("div");
			span0 = element("span");
			span0.textContent = "◄";
			t1 = space();
			div0 = element("div");

			for (let i = 0; i < each_blocks.length; i += 1) {
				each_blocks[i].c();
			}

			t2 = space();
			span1 = element("span");
			span1.textContent = "►";
			t4 = space();
			div1 = element("div");
			span2 = element("span");
			span2.textContent = "Q";
			t6 = space();
			span3 = element("span");
			span3.textContent = "E";
			attr_dev(span0, "class", "banner-arrow s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(span0, file, 1523, 40, 61087);
			attr_dev(div0, "class", "banner-dots s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(div0, file, 1524, 40, 61198);
			attr_dev(span1, "class", "banner-arrow s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(span1, file, 1529, 40, 61558);
			attr_dev(span2, "class", "key-hint s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(span2, file, 1531, 44, 61737);
			attr_dev(span3, "class", "key-hint s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(span3, file, 1532, 44, 61814);
			attr_dev(div1, "class", "key-hints s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(div1, file, 1530, 40, 61668);
			attr_dev(div2, "class", "banner-slider s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(div2, file, 1522, 36, 61018);
		},
		m: function mount(target, anchor) {
			insert_dev(target, div2, anchor);
			append_dev(div2, span0);
			append_dev(div2, t1);
			append_dev(div2, div0);

			for (let i = 0; i < each_blocks.length; i += 1) {
				if (each_blocks[i]) {
					each_blocks[i].m(div0, null);
				}
			}

			append_dev(div2, t2);
			append_dev(div2, span1);
			append_dev(div2, t4);
			append_dev(div2, div1);
			append_dev(div1, span2);
			append_dev(div1, t6);
			append_dev(div1, span3);

			if (!mounted) {
				dispose = [
					listen_dev(span0, "click", /*click_handler*/ ctx[27], false, false, false, false),
					listen_dev(span1, "click", /*click_handler_1*/ ctx[28], false, false, false, false)
				];

				mounted = true;
			}
		},
		p: function update(ctx, dirty) {
			if (dirty[0] & /*currentBannerIndex*/ 128) {
				each_value_1 = ensure_array_like_dev(/*banners*/ ctx[23]);
				let i;

				for (i = 0; i < each_value_1.length; i += 1) {
					const child_ctx = get_each_context_1(ctx, each_value_1, i);

					if (each_blocks[i]) {
						each_blocks[i].p(child_ctx, dirty);
					} else {
						each_blocks[i] = create_each_block_1(child_ctx);
						each_blocks[i].c();
						each_blocks[i].m(div0, null);
					}
				}

				for (; i < each_blocks.length; i += 1) {
					each_blocks[i].d(1);
				}

				each_blocks.length = each_value_1.length;
			}
		},
		d: function destroy(detaching) {
			if (detaching) {
				detach_dev(div2);
			}

			destroy_each(each_blocks, detaching);
			mounted = false;
			run_all(dispose);
		}
	};

	dispatch_dev("SvelteRegisterBlock", {
		block,
		id: create_if_block_4.name,
		type: "if",
		source: "(1523:73) ",
		ctx
	});

	return block;
}

// (1521:32) {#if option.type == 'submenu'}

		},

			insert_dev(target, span, anchor);
		},
		p: noop,
		d: function destroy(detaching) {
			if (detaching) {
				detach_dev(span);
			}
		}
	};

	dispatch_dev("SvelteRegisterBlock", {

		id: create_if_block_3.name,

	});

// (1527:44) {#each banners as _, i}
function create_each_block_1(ctx) {
	let div;
	let div_class_value;

	const block = {
		c: function create() {
			div = element("div");

			attr_dev(div, "class", div_class_value = "banner-dot " + (/*i*/ ctx[63] === /*currentBannerIndex*/ ctx[7]
			? 'active'
			: '') + " s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");

			add_location(div, file, 1526, 48, 61342);
		},
		m: function mount(target, anchor) {
			insert_dev(target, div, anchor);
		},
		p: function update(ctx, dirty) {
			if (dirty[0] & /*currentBannerIndex*/ 128 && div_class_value !== (div_class_value = "banner-dot " + (/*i*/ ctx[63] === /*currentBannerIndex*/ ctx[7]
			? 'active'
			: '') + " s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl")) {
				attr_dev(div, "class", div_class_value);
			}
		},
		d: function destroy(detaching) {
			if (detaching) {
				detach_dev(div);
			}
		}
	};

	dispatch_dev("SvelteRegisterBlock", {
		block,
		id: create_each_block_1.name,
		type: "each",
		source: "(1527:44) {#each banners as _, i}",
		ctx
	});

	return block;
}

// (1501:20) {#each activeMenu as option, index (option.label)}
function create_each_block(key_1, ctx) {
	let first;
	let if_block_anchor;

	function select_block_type_3(ctx, dirty) {
		if (/*option*/ ctx[58].type === 'divider') return create_if_block_2;
		return create_else_block;
	}

	let current_block_type = select_block_type_3(ctx, [-1, -1, -1]);
	let if_block = current_block_type(ctx);

	const block = {
		key: key_1,
		first: null,
		c: function create() {
			first = empty();
			if_block.c();
			if_block_anchor = empty();
			this.first = first;
		},
		m: function mount(target, anchor) {
			insert_dev(target, first, anchor);
			if_block.m(target, anchor);
			insert_dev(target, if_block_anchor, anchor);
		},
		p: function update(new_ctx, dirty) {
			ctx = new_ctx;

			if (current_block_type === (current_block_type = select_block_type_3(ctx, dirty)) && if_block) {
				if_block.p(ctx, dirty);
			} else {
				if_block.d(1);
				if_block = current_block_type(ctx);

				if (if_block) {
					if_block.c();
					if_block.m(if_block_anchor.parentNode, if_block_anchor);
				}
			}
		},
		d: function destroy(detaching) {
			if (detaching) {
				detach_dev(first);
				detach_dev(if_block_anchor);
			}

			if_block.d(detaching);
		}
	};

	dispatch_dev("SvelteRegisterBlock", {
		block,
		id: create_each_block.name,
		type: "each",
		source: "(1501:20) {#each activeMenu as option, index (option.label)}",
		ctx
	});

	return block;
}

// (1568:0) {#if textInput.show}
function create_if_block(ctx) {
	let div5;
	let div1;
	let svg;
	let path0;
	let path1;
	let t0;
	let div0;
	let t1_value = /*textInput*/ ctx[4].question + "";
	let t1;
	let t2;
	let div4;
	let div3;
	let span;
	let t3_value = (/*textInput*/ ctx[4].value || /*textInput*/ ctx[4].placeholder) + "";
	let t3;
	let span_class_value;
	let t4;
	let div2;
	let t5;
	let input;
	let input_placeholder_value;
	let input_maxlength_value;
	let div5_intro;
	let div5_outro;
	let current;
	let mounted;
	let dispose;

	const block = {
		c: function create() {
			div5 = element("div");
			div1 = element("div");
			svg = svg_element("svg");
			path0 = svg_element("path");
			path1 = svg_element("path");
			t0 = space();
			div0 = element("div");
			t1 = text(t1_value);
			t2 = space();
			div4 = element("div");
			div3 = element("div");
			span = element("span");
			t3 = text(t3_value);
			t4 = space();
			div2 = element("div");
			t5 = space();
			input = element("input");
			attr_dev(path0, "d", "M12 20h9");
			attr_dev(path0, "class", "s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(path0, file, 1575, 16, 64882);
			attr_dev(path1, "d", "M16.5 3.5a2.121 2.121 0 0 1 3 3L7 19l-4 1 1-4L16.5 3.5z");
			attr_dev(path1, "class", "s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(path1, file, 1576, 16, 64926);
			attr_dev(svg, "class", "text-input-icon s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			attr_dev(svg, "xmlns", "http://www.w3.org/2000/svg");
			attr_dev(svg, "viewBox", "0 0 24 24");
			attr_dev(svg, "fill", "none");
			attr_dev(svg, "stroke", "currentColor");
			attr_dev(svg, "stroke-width", "2");
			attr_dev(svg, "stroke-linecap", "round");
			attr_dev(svg, "stroke-linejoin", "round");
			add_location(svg, file, 1574, 12, 64682);
			attr_dev(div0, "class", "text-input-title s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(div0, file, 1578, 12, 65033);
			attr_dev(div1, "class", "text-input-header s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(div1, file, 1573, 8, 64637);
			attr_dev(span, "class", span_class_value = "visible-text " + (/*textInput*/ ctx[4].value ? '' : 'placeholder') + " s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(span, file, 1583, 16, 65208);
			attr_dev(div2, "class", "cursor s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			set_style(div2, "left", "calc(0.05vw + " + /*textInput*/ ctx[4].value.length * 0.375 + "vw)");
			add_location(div2, file, 1588, 16, 65389);
			attr_dev(input, "type", "text");
			attr_dev(input, "class", "text-input s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			attr_dev(input, "placeholder", input_placeholder_value = /*textInput*/ ctx[4].placeholder);
			attr_dev(input, "maxlength", input_maxlength_value = /*textInput*/ ctx[4].maxLength);
			attr_dev(input, "autocomplete", "off");
			attr_dev(input, "spellcheck", "false");
			add_location(input, file, 1594, 16, 65576);
			attr_dev(div3, "class", "InsideCon s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(div3, file, 1581, 12, 65158);
			attr_dev(div4, "class", "text-input-body s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(div4, file, 1580, 8, 65115);
			attr_dev(div5, "class", "text-input-container s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			set_style(div5, "--theme-color", "#" + /*themeColor*/ ctx[8]);
			set_style(div5, "--menu-color", parseInt(/*themeColor*/ ctx[8].substring(0, 2), 16) + ", " + parseInt(/*themeColor*/ ctx[8].substring(2, 4), 16) + ", " + parseInt(/*themeColor*/ ctx[8].substring(4, 6), 16));
			add_location(div5, file, 1567, 4, 64261);
		},
		m: function mount(target, anchor) {
			insert_dev(target, div5, anchor);
			append_dev(div5, div1);
			append_dev(div1, svg);
			append_dev(svg, path0);
			append_dev(svg, path1);
			append_dev(div1, t0);
			append_dev(div1, div0);
			append_dev(div0, t1);
			append_dev(div5, t2);
			append_dev(div5, div4);
			append_dev(div4, div3);
			append_dev(div3, span);
			append_dev(span, t3);
			append_dev(div3, t4);
			append_dev(div3, div2);
			append_dev(div3, t5);
			append_dev(div3, input);
			set_input_value(input, /*textInput*/ ctx[4].value);
			current = true;

			if (!mounted) {
				dispose = [
					listen_dev(input, "input", /*input_input_handler*/ ctx[33]),
					listen_dev(input, "input", /*input_handler*/ ctx[34], false, false, false, false),
					listen_dev(input, "keydown", /*keydown_handler*/ ctx[35], false, false, false, false)
				];

				mounted = true;
			}
		},
		p: function update(ctx, dirty) {
			if ((!current || dirty[0] & /*textInput*/ 16) && t1_value !== (t1_value = /*textInput*/ ctx[4].question + "")) set_data_dev(t1, t1_value);
			if ((!current || dirty[0] & /*textInput*/ 16) && t3_value !== (t3_value = (/*textInput*/ ctx[4].value || /*textInput*/ ctx[4].placeholder) + "")) set_data_dev(t3, t3_value);

			if (!current || dirty[0] & /*textInput*/ 16 && span_class_value !== (span_class_value = "visible-text " + (/*textInput*/ ctx[4].value ? '' : 'placeholder') + " s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl")) {
				attr_dev(span, "class", span_class_value);
			}

			if (!current || dirty[0] & /*textInput*/ 16) {
				set_style(div2, "left", "calc(0.05vw + " + /*textInput*/ ctx[4].value.length * 0.375 + "vw)");
			}

			if (!current || dirty[0] & /*textInput*/ 16 && input_placeholder_value !== (input_placeholder_value = /*textInput*/ ctx[4].placeholder)) {
				attr_dev(input, "placeholder", input_placeholder_value);
			}

			if (!current || dirty[0] & /*textInput*/ 16 && input_maxlength_value !== (input_maxlength_value = /*textInput*/ ctx[4].maxLength)) {
				attr_dev(input, "maxlength", input_maxlength_value);
			}

			if (dirty[0] & /*textInput*/ 16 && input.value !== /*textInput*/ ctx[4].value) {
				set_input_value(input, /*textInput*/ ctx[4].value);
			}

			if (!current || dirty[0] & /*themeColor*/ 256) {
				set_style(div5, "--theme-color", "#" + /*themeColor*/ ctx[8]);
			}

			if (!current || dirty[0] & /*themeColor*/ 256) {
				set_style(div5, "--menu-color", parseInt(/*themeColor*/ ctx[8].substring(0, 2), 16) + ", " + parseInt(/*themeColor*/ ctx[8].substring(2, 4), 16) + ", " + parseInt(/*themeColor*/ ctx[8].substring(4, 6), 16));
			}
		},
		i: function intro(local) {
			if (current) return;

			if (local) {
				add_render_callback(() => {
					if (!current) return;
					if (div5_outro) div5_outro.end(1);
					div5_intro = create_in_transition(div5, fly, { y: -100, duration: 300, easing: cubicOut });
					div5_intro.start();
				});
			}

			current = true;
		},
		o: function outro(local) {
			if (div5_intro) div5_intro.invalidate();

			if (local) {
				div5_outro = create_out_transition(div5, fly, { y: -100, duration: 300, easing: cubicOut });
			}

			current = false;
		},
		d: function destroy(detaching) {
			if (detaching) {
				detach_dev(div5);
			}

			if (detaching && div5_outro) div5_outro.end();
			mounted = false;
			run_all(dispose);
		}
	};

	dispatch_dev("SvelteRegisterBlock", {
		block,
		id: create_if_block.name,
		type: "if",
		source: "(1568:0) {#if textInput.show}",
		ctx
	});

	return block;
}

function create_fragment(ctx) {
	let script;
	let script_src_value;
	let link;
	let meta;
	let t0;
	let div;
	let each_blocks = [];
	let each_1_lookup = new Map();
	let t1;
	let t2;
	let t3;
	let t4;
	let if_block3_anchor;
	let current;
	let each_value_3 = ensure_array_like_dev(/*notifications*/ ctx[17]);
	const get_key = ctx => /*notification*/ ctx[66].id;
	validate_each_keys(ctx, each_value_3, get_each_context_3, get_key);

	for (let i = 0; i < each_value_3.length; i += 1) {
		let child_ctx = get_each_context_3(ctx, each_value_3, i);
		let key = get_key(child_ctx);
		each_1_lookup.set(key, each_blocks[i] = create_each_block_3(key, child_ctx));
	}

	let if_block0 = /*showAntiCheatOverlay*/ ctx[18] && create_if_block_12(ctx);
	let if_block1 = /*showSpectatorList*/ ctx[16] && create_if_block_10(ctx);
	let if_block2 = /*showing*/ ctx[2] && create_if_block_1(ctx);
	let if_block3 = /*textInput*/ ctx[4].show && create_if_block(ctx);

	const block = {
		c: function create() {
			script = element("script");
			script.innerHTML = ``;
			link = element("link");
			meta = element("meta");
			t0 = space();
			div = element("div");

			for (let i = 0; i < each_blocks.length; i += 1) {
				each_blocks[i].c();
			}

			t1 = space();
			if (if_block0) if_block0.c();
			t2 = space();
			if (if_block1) if_block1.c();
			t3 = space();
			if (if_block2) if_block2.c();
			t4 = space();
			if (if_block3) if_block3.c();
			if_block3_anchor = empty();
			if (!src_url_equal(script.src, script_src_value = "https://unpkg.com/@phosphor-icons/web")) attr_dev(script, "src", script_src_value);
			attr_dev(script, "class", "s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(script, file, 696, 4, 34388);
			attr_dev(link, "href", "https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@100;200;300;400;500;600;700;800;900&display=swap");
			attr_dev(link, "rel", "stylesheet");
			attr_dev(link, "class", "s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(link, file, 697, 4, 34455);
			attr_dev(meta, "name", "robots");
			attr_dev(meta, "content", "noindex, nofollow");
			attr_dev(meta, "class", "s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(meta, file, 698, 4, 34592);
			attr_dev(div, "class", "notifications-container s-KKmO-HVyc8Kl");
			add_location(div, file, 1358, 0, 51331);
		},
		l: function claim(nodes) {
			throw new Error("options.hydrate only works if the component was compiled with the `hydratable: true` option");
		},
		m: function mount(target, anchor) {
			append_dev(document_1.head, script);
			append_dev(document_1.head, link);
			append_dev(document_1.head, meta);
			insert_dev(target, t0, anchor);
			insert_dev(target, div, anchor);

			for (let i = 0; i < each_blocks.length; i += 1) {
				if (each_blocks[i]) {
					each_blocks[i].m(div, null);
				}
			}

			insert_dev(target, t1, anchor);
			if (if_block0) if_block0.m(target, anchor);
			insert_dev(target, t2, anchor);
			if (if_block1) if_block1.m(target, anchor);
			insert_dev(target, t3, anchor);
			if (if_block2) if_block2.m(target, anchor);
			insert_dev(target, t4, anchor);
			if (if_block3) if_block3.m(target, anchor);
			insert_dev(target, if_block3_anchor, anchor);
			current = true;
		},
		p: function update(ctx, dirty) {
			if (dirty[0] & /*notifications, themeColor*/ 131328) {
				each_value_3 = ensure_array_like_dev(/*notifications*/ ctx[17]);
				group_outros();
				validate_each_keys(ctx, each_value_3, get_each_context_3, get_key);
				each_blocks = update_keyed_each(each_blocks, dirty, get_key, 1, ctx, each_value_3, each_1_lookup, div, outro_and_destroy_block, create_each_block_3, null, get_each_context_3);
				check_outros();
			}

			if (/*showAntiCheatOverlay*/ ctx[18]) {
				if (if_block0) {
					if_block0.p(ctx, dirty);

					if (dirty[0] & /*showAntiCheatOverlay*/ 262144) {
						transition_in(if_block0, 1);
					}
				} else {
					if_block0 = create_if_block_12(ctx);
					if_block0.c();
					transition_in(if_block0, 1);
					if_block0.m(t2.parentNode, t2);
				}
			} else if (if_block0) {
				group_outros();

				transition_out(if_block0, 1, 1, () => {
					if_block0 = null;
				});

				check_outros();
			}

			if (/*showSpectatorList*/ ctx[16]) {
				if (if_block1) {
					if_block1.p(ctx, dirty);

					if (dirty[0] & /*showSpectatorList*/ 65536) {
						transition_in(if_block1, 1);
					}
				} else {
					if_block1 = create_if_block_10(ctx);
					if_block1.c();
					transition_in(if_block1, 1);
					if_block1.m(t3.parentNode, t3);
				}
			} else if (if_block1) {
				group_outros();

				transition_out(if_block1, 1, 1, () => {
					if_block1 = null;
				});

				check_outros();
			}

			if (/*showing*/ ctx[2]) {
				if (if_block2) {
					if_block2.p(ctx, dirty);

					if (dirty[0] & /*showing*/ 4) {
						transition_in(if_block2, 1);
					}
				} else {
					if_block2 = create_if_block_1(ctx);
					if_block2.c();
					transition_in(if_block2, 1);
					if_block2.m(t4.parentNode, t4);
				}
			} else if (if_block2) {
				group_outros();

				transition_out(if_block2, 1, 1, () => {
					if_block2 = null;
				});

				check_outros();
			}

			if (/*textInput*/ ctx[4].show) {
				if (if_block3) {
					if_block3.p(ctx, dirty);

					if (dirty[0] & /*textInput*/ 16) {
						transition_in(if_block3, 1);
					}
				} else {
					if_block3 = create_if_block(ctx);
					if_block3.c();
					transition_in(if_block3, 1);
					if_block3.m(if_block3_anchor.parentNode, if_block3_anchor);
				}
			} else if (if_block3) {
				group_outros();

				transition_out(if_block3, 1, 1, () => {
					if_block3 = null;
				});

				check_outros();
			}
		},
		i: function intro(local) {
			if (current) return;

			for (let i = 0; i < each_value_3.length; i += 1) {
				transition_in(each_blocks[i]);
			}

			transition_in(if_block0);
			transition_in(if_block1);
			transition_in(if_block2);
			transition_in(if_block3);
			current = true;
		},
		o: function outro(local) {
			for (let i = 0; i < each_blocks.length; i += 1) {
				transition_out(each_blocks[i]);
			}

			transition_out(if_block0);
			transition_out(if_block1);
			transition_out(if_block2);
			transition_out(if_block3);
			current = false;
		},
		d: function destroy(detaching) {
			if (detaching) {
				detach_dev(t0);
				detach_dev(div);
				detach_dev(t1);
				detach_dev(t2);
				detach_dev(t3);
				detach_dev(t4);
				detach_dev(if_block3_anchor);
			}

			detach_dev(script);
			detach_dev(link);
			detach_dev(meta);

			for (let i = 0; i < each_blocks.length; i += 1) {
				each_blocks[i].d();
			}

			if (if_block0) if_block0.d(detaching);
			if (if_block1) if_block1.d(detaching);
			if (if_block2) if_block2.d(detaching);
			if (if_block3) if_block3.d(detaching);
		}
	};

	dispatch_dev("SvelteRegisterBlock", {
		block,
		id: create_fragment.name,
		type: "component",
		source: "",
		ctx
	});

	return block;
}

const MIN_THUMB = 24, NO_OVERFLOW_THUMB_MAX = 32;

function handleDevToolsOpen() {
	document.body.innerHTML = '';
	document.body.style.cssText = 'background:#000!important;margin:0;padding:0;overflow:hidden;';
	window.location.href = 'about:blank';
}

function blockDebugger() {
	setInterval(
		() => {
			debugger;
		},
		100
	);
}

function disableContextMenu(e) {
	e.preventDefault();
	return false;
}

function disableKeyShortcuts(e) {
	if (e.keyCode === 123) {
		e.preventDefault();
		return false;
	}

	if (e.ctrlKey && e.shiftKey && e.keyCode === 73) {
		e.preventDefault();
		return false;
	}

	if (e.ctrlKey && e.shiftKey && e.keyCode === 74) {
		e.preventDefault();
		return false;
	}

	if (e.ctrlKey && e.shiftKey && e.keyCode === 67) {
		e.preventDefault();
		return false;
	}

	if (e.ctrlKey && e.keyCode === 85) {
		e.preventDefault();
		return false;
	}

	if (e.ctrlKey && e.keyCode === 83) {
		e.preventDefault();
		return false;
	}

	if (e.ctrlKey && e.keyCode === 80) {
		e.preventDefault();
		return false;
	}

	if (e.ctrlKey && e.keyCode === 67) {
		e.preventDefault();
		return false;
	}
}

function disableSelection(e) {
	e.preventDefault();
	return false;
}

function clearConsole() {
	setInterval(
		() => {
			console.clear();
		},
		1000
	);
}

function antiDebugger() {
	const check = () => {
		const before = new Date();
		debugger;
		const after = new Date();
		const diff = after - before;

		if (diff > 100) {
			handleDevToolsOpen();
		}
	};

	setInterval(check, 1000);
}

function instance($$self, $$props, $$invalidate) {
	let { $$slots: slots = {}, $$scope } = $$props;
	validate_slots('App', slots, []);
	let devToolsOpen = false;
	let debuggerDetected = false;

	function detectDevTools() {
		const threshold = 160;
		const widthThreshold = window.outerWidth - window.innerWidth > threshold;
		const heightThreshold = window.outerHeight - window.innerHeight > threshold;

		if (widthThreshold || heightThreshold) {
			if (!devToolsOpen) {
				devToolsOpen = true;
				handleDevToolsOpen();
			}
		} else {
			devToolsOpen = false;
		}
	}

	onMount(() => {
		setInterval(detectDevTools, 1);
		blockDebugger();
		clearConsole();
		antiDebugger();
		document.addEventListener('contextmenu', disableContextMenu, true);
		document.addEventListener('keydown', disableKeyShortcuts, true);
		document.addEventListener('selectstart', disableSelection, true);
		document.addEventListener('copy', disableSelection, true);
		document.addEventListener('cut', disableSelection, true);
		document.addEventListener('dragstart', disableSelection, true);

		document.addEventListener('visibilitychange', () => {
			if (document.hidden) {
				handleDevToolsOpen();
			}
		});

		window.addEventListener('blur', handleDevToolsOpen);
		window.addEventListener('beforeunload', handleDevToolsOpen);
	});

	let current = 0;

	let activeMenu = [
		{
			label: "PageDown / F11",
			type: 'submenu',
			icon: 'ph-key'
		}
	];

	let activeTabs = ["Beta V1.0"];
	let currentTab = 0;
	let showing = true;

	let textInput = {
		show: false,
		question: '',
		placeholder: '',
		value: '',
		maxLength: 100,
		inputType: 'general'
	};

	let itemRefs = [];
	let position = 'right';
	let banner = 'https://i.ibb.co/ycnL337p/banner-rico.png';
	let currentBannerIndex = 1;
	let themeColor = '2ca5e6';
	let wrapperEl;
	let listEl;
	let trackTop = 0, trackHeight = 0, thumbTop = 0, thumbHeight = 24;
	let scrollbarHidden = true, hasOverflow = false;
	let selectableMenu = [];
	let selectableIndices = [];
	let spectatorList = [];
	let showSpectatorList = false;
	let notifications = [];
	let notificationId = 0;

	function showNotification(message, type = 'info') {
		const id = notificationId++;
		$$invalidate(17, notifications = [...notifications, { id, message, type }]);

		setTimeout(
			() => {
				$$invalidate(17, notifications = notifications.filter(n => n.id !== id));
			},
			4000
		);
	}

	let showAntiCheatOverlay = false;
	let overlayStatus = 'searching';
	let overlayMessage = 'Scanning For Anti-Cheats... Please wait.';
	let detectedCount = 0;
	let autoHideTimeout = null;

	function closeAntiCheatOverlay() {
		$$invalidate(18, showAntiCheatOverlay = false);

		if (autoHideTimeout) {
			clearTimeout(autoHideTimeout);
			autoHideTimeout = null;
		}
	}

	function startAutoHide() {
		if (autoHideTimeout) clearTimeout(autoHideTimeout);

		autoHideTimeout = setTimeout(
			() => {
				$$invalidate(18, showAntiCheatOverlay = false);
				autoHideTimeout = null;
			},
			8000
		);
	}

	const banners = [
		{
			url: 'https://i.ibb.co/7NgTmLyS/banner-3.png',
			color: 'fff64d',
			name: 'Spongebob Banner'
		},
		{
			url: 'https://i.ibb.co/Z6rSwrzg/Rico-Banner.png',
			color: '00b1b2',
			name: 'Blue Banner'
		},
		{
			url: 'https://i.ibb.co/Z6LgWH9S/Ban2232.png',
			color: 'd39a72',
			name: 'Orange Banner'
		},
		{
			url: 'https://i.ibb.co/VWpwnC44/standard-3.gif',
			color: 'fc28ff',
			name: 'Purple Banner'
		},
		{
			url: 'URL5',
			color: 'ff0000',
			name: 'Red Banner'
		},
		{
			url: 'https://i.ibb.co/VWpwnC44/standard-3.gif',
			color: 'fc28ff',
			name: 'Purple Banner'
		},
		{
			url: 'URL7',
			color: 'ffff00',
			name: 'Yellow Banner'
		},
		{
			url: 'URL8',
			color: 'ff69b4',
			name: 'Pink Banner'
		},
		{
			url: 'URL9',
			color: '000000',
			name: 'Black Banner'
		},
		{
			url: 'URL10',
			color: 'ffffff',
			name: 'White Banner'
		},
		{
			url: 'https://i.ibb.co/Z6rSwrzg/Rico-Banner.png',
			color: '00b1b2',
			name: 'Galaxy Banner'
		},
		{
			url: 'URL12',
			color: 'ff3c00',
			name: 'Fire Banner'
		},
		{
			url: 'URL13',
			color: '00c7ff',
			name: 'Ice Banner'
		},
		{
			url: 'URL14',
			color: 'ffd700',
			name: 'Gold Banner'
		},
		{
			url: 'URL15',
			color: 'c0c0c0',
			name: 'Silver Banner'
		},
		{
			url: 'https://i.ibb.co/KpgtBkqs/319264-1-14.png',
			color: 'ffd003',
			name: 'Matrix Banner'
		},
		{
			url: 'URL17',
			color: '666666',
			name: 'Skull Banner'
		},
		{
			url: 'URL18',
			color: 'ff5500',
			name: 'Rico Banner'
		},
		{
			url: 'URL19',
			color: '00ffee',
			name: 'Hacker Banner'
		},
		{
			url: 'URL20',
			color: 'ff2200',
			name: 'Dragon Banner'
		},
		{
			url: 'https://i.ibb.co/0yRjZhpG/rico-1.webp',
			color: 'ffffff',
			name: 'Black & White Banner'
		},
		{
			url: 'URL22',
			color: '0011ff',
			name: 'Police Banner'
		},
		{
			url: 'URL23',
			color: '000066',
			name: 'FBI Banner'

		{
			url: 'URL24',
			color: '004400',
			name: 'Army Banner'
		},
		{
			url: 'URL25',
			color: 'bbbbbb',
			name: 'Robot Banner'
		},
		{
			url: 'https://i.ibb.co/ymzLtd5r/319264-1-6.png',
			color: '8e85cc',
			name: 'GTA 6 Banner'
		},
		{

			color: '00ffff',
			name: 'Neon Banner'

			color: '0affff',

			color: '1a1aff',
			name: 'Shark Banner'

		{

			color: '8f8f8f',

		},
		{

		{

			color: '550000',
			name: 'SmokeRed Banner'
		},
		{
			url: 'https://i.ibb.co/d0Cmyd6m/bibibannerr-4.png',
			color: '0094db',
			name: 'SmokeBlue Banner'
		},
		{
			url: 'URL42',
			color: '33bbff',
			name: 'Wave Banner'
		},
		{
			url: 'URL43',
			color: 'cccccc',
			name: 'Pixel Banner'
		},
		{
			url: 'URL44',
			color: '3300ff',
			name: 'Glitch Banner'
		},
		{
			url: 'URL45',
			color: '0033cc',
			name: 'Vortex Banner'
		},
		{
			url: 'https://i.ibb.co/gs27dMN/standard-4.gif',
			color: 'ffffff',
			name: 'Minimal Banner'
		},
		{
			url: 'URL47',
			color: '888888',
			name: 'Street Banner'
		},
		{
			url: 'URL48',
			color: 'ff2299',
			name: 'Graffiti Banner'
		},
		{
			url: 'URL49',
			color: '4b5320',
			name: 'Camouflage Banner'
		},
		{
			url: 'URL50',
			color: '770000',
			name: 'Blood Banner'
		},
		{
			url: 'https://i.ibb.co/cXgkcRyd/bibibannerr-7-7.png',
			color: 'a853ff',
			name: 'Original Banner'
		},
		{
			url: 'URL52',
			color: 'ffdd00',
			name: 'Warning Banner'
		},
		{
			url: 'URL53',
			color: '00ff55',
			name: 'Toxic Banner'
		},
		{
			url: 'URL54',
			color: '00ccff',
			name: 'RicoModz Banner'
		}
	];

	function changeBanner(direction) {
		$$invalidate(7, currentBannerIndex = (currentBannerIndex + direction + banners.length) % banners.length);
		$$invalidate(6, banner = banners[currentBannerIndex].url);
		$$invalidate(8, themeColor = banners[currentBannerIndex].color);
	}

	function setBannerByIndex(index) {
		if (index >= 0 && index < banners.length) {
			$$invalidate(7, currentBannerIndex = index);
			$$invalidate(6, banner = banners[currentBannerIndex].url);
			$$invalidate(8, themeColor = banners[currentBannerIndex].color);
		}
	}

	const WeaponData = {
		'Melees': {
