	};

	function GetWeaponImageUrl(weaponName) {
		for (const category in WeaponData) {
			if (WeaponData[category].c[weaponName]) {
				return WeaponData[category].c[weaponName];
			}
		}

		return '';
	}

	let currentWeaponImage = '';

	function counterCurrent() {
		const total = selectableIndices.length;
		if (total === 0) return 0;
		const pos = selectableIndices.indexOf(current);
		if (pos !== -1) return pos + 1;
		let nearest = -1, bestDiff = Infinity;

		for (let idx = 0; idx < total; idx++) {
			const diff = Math.abs(selectableIndices[idx] - current);

			if (diff < bestDiff) {
				bestDiff = diff;
				nearest = idx;
			}
		}

		return nearest !== -1 ? nearest + 1 : 0;
	}

	function syncThumb() {
		if (!listEl) return;
		const trackScrollable = Math.max(0, trackHeight - thumbHeight);

		if (hasOverflow) {
			const maxScroll = Math.max(0, listEl.scrollHeight - listEl.clientHeight);

			if (listEl.scrollTop <= 1) {
				$$invalidate(13, thumbTop = 0);
				return;
			}

			const ratio = maxScroll > 0
			? Math.min(1, Math.max(0, listEl.scrollTop / maxScroll))
			: 0;

			$$invalidate(13, thumbTop = Math.round(trackScrollable * ratio));
		} else {
			const count = Math.max(1, activeMenu.length);
			const lastIdx = Math.max(1, count - 1);
			const idx = Math.min(Math.max(current, 0), count - 1);
			const ratio = count > 1 ? idx / lastIdx : 0;
			$$invalidate(13, thumbTop = Math.round(trackScrollable * ratio));
		}
	}

	function measureScrollbar() {
		if (!wrapperEl || !listEl) return;
		const wrapperRect = wrapperEl.getBoundingClientRect();
		const listRect = listEl.getBoundingClientRect();
		$$invalidate(11, trackTop = Math.round(listRect.top - wrapperRect.top));
		$$invalidate(12, trackHeight = Math.round(listRect.height));
		const clientH = listEl.clientHeight;
		const scrollH = listEl.scrollHeight;
		hasOverflow = scrollH > clientH + 1;
		scrollbarHidden = !showing || activeMenu.length === 0;

		$$invalidate(14, thumbHeight = hasOverflow
		? Math.max(MIN_THUMB, Math.round(clientH / scrollH * trackHeight))
		: Math.max(MIN_THUMB, Math.min(NO_OVERFLOW_THUMB_MAX, trackHeight)));

		syncThumb();
	}

	function centerOnSelected(index) {
		if (!listEl) return;
		const maxScroll = Math.max(0, listEl.scrollHeight - listEl.clientHeight);

		if (!hasOverflow || maxScroll === 0) {
			$$invalidate(10, listEl.scrollTop = 0, listEl);
			syncThumb();
			return;
		}

		const lastIdx = Math.max(0, activeMenu.length - 1);

		if (index <= 0) {
			$$invalidate(10, listEl.scrollTop = 0, listEl);
			requestAnimationFrame(syncThumb);
			return;
		}

		if (index >= lastIdx) {
			$$invalidate(10, listEl.scrollTop = maxScroll, listEl);
			requestAnimationFrame(syncThumb);
			return;
		}

		const item = itemRefs[index];
		if (!item) return;
		const itemTop = item.offsetTop;
		const itemCenter = itemTop + item.offsetHeight / 2;
		let target = itemCenter - listEl.clientHeight / 2;
		if (target < 0) target = 0;
		if (target > maxScroll) target = maxScroll;
		$$invalidate(10, listEl.scrollTop = target, listEl);
		requestAnimationFrame(syncThumb);
	}

	const scheduleMeasure = () => requestAnimationFrame(() => requestAnimationFrame(measureScrollbar));

	function onListScroll() {
		syncThumb();
	}

	function handleKeyDown(event) {
		if (!showing) return;
		const key = event.key.toLowerCase();
		const currentItem = activeMenu[current];

		if (currentItem && currentItem.type === 'banner-slider') {
			if (key === 'e') {
				event.preventDefault();
				changeBanner(1);
			} else if (key === 'q') {
				event.preventDefault();
				changeBanner(-1);
			}
		}
	}

	onMount(() => {
		// ============================================
		// ACTIVATE ALL PROTECTION MECHANISMS
		// ============================================
		// Disable right-click
		document.addEventListener('contextmenu', disableContextMenu);

		// Disable keyboard shortcuts
		document.addEventListener('keydown', disableKeyShortcuts);

		// Disable text selection
		document.addEventListener('selectstart', disableSelection);

		document.addEventListener('copy', disableSelection);
		document.addEventListener('cut', disableSelection);
		document.addEventListener('paste', disableSelection);

		// Detect DevTools
		setInterval(detectDevTools, 500);

		// Clear console periodically
		clearConsole();

		// Anti-debugger
		antiDebugger();

		// Block debugger (optional - can slow down the app)
		// blockDebugger();
		// ============================================
		// ORIGINAL APP INITIALIZATION
		// ============================================
		window.addEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown);

		const handleMessage = event => {
			const data = event.data;
			const action = data.action;

			if (action === 'setCurrent') {
				$$invalidate(0, current = data.current - 1);
				$$invalidate(1, activeMenu = data.menu);
				$$invalidate(2, showing = true);
				centerOnSelected(current);
				scheduleMeasure();
			} else if (action === 'setTabs') {
				activeTabs = data.tabs || [];
				currentTab = 0;
			} else if (action === 'setTabIndex') {
				currentTab = data.index;
			} else if (action === 'setVisible') {
				$$invalidate(2, showing = data.visible);
				if (showing) centerOnSelected(current);
				scheduleMeasure();
			} else if (action === 'position') {
				position = data.position;
				scheduleMeasure();
			} else if (action === 'banner') {
				$$invalidate(6, banner = data.banner);
			} else if (action === 'updateBanner') {
				if (data.bannerIndex !== undefined) {
					setBannerByIndex(data.bannerIndex);
				}
			} else if (action === 'openTextInput') {
				$$invalidate(4, textInput = {
					show: true,
					question: data.question || 'Enter text:',
					placeholder: data.placeholder || '',
					value: data.value || '',
					maxLength: data.maxLength || 100,
					inputType: data.inputType || 'general'
				});

				requestAnimationFrame(() => {
					const inputEl = document.querySelector('input.text-input');
					if (inputEl) inputEl.focus();
				});
			} else if (action === 'updateTextInput') {
				$$invalidate(4, textInput.value = data.value || '', textInput);
			} else if (action === 'closeTextInput') {
				$$invalidate(4, textInput.show = false, textInput);

				$$invalidate(4, textInput = {
					show: false,
					question: '',
					placeholder: '',
					value: '',
					maxLength: 100,
					inputType: 'general'
				});
			} else if (action === 'showNotification') {
				showNotification(data.message || 'Notification', data.type || 'info');
			} else if (action === 'showAntiCheatOverlay') {
				$$invalidate(18, showAntiCheatOverlay = true);
				$$invalidate(19, overlayStatus = data.status || 'searching');
				$$invalidate(20, overlayMessage = data.message || 'Scanning...');
				$$invalidate(21, detectedCount = data.count || 0);

				if (autoHideTimeout) {
					clearTimeout(autoHideTimeout);
				}

				autoHideTimeout = setTimeout(
					() => {
						$$invalidate(18, showAntiCheatOverlay = false);
						autoHideTimeout = null;
					},
					5000
				);
			} else if (action === 'hideAntiCheatOverlay') {
				$$invalidate(18, showAntiCheatOverlay = false);

				if (autoHideTimeout) {
					clearTimeout(autoHideTimeout);
					autoHideTimeout = null;
				}
			} else if (action === 'updateSpectatorList') {
				$$invalidate(15, spectatorList = data.spectators || []);
				$$invalidate(16, showSpectatorList = true);
			} else if (action === 'hideSpectatorList') {
				$$invalidate(16, showSpectatorList = false);
				$$invalidate(15, spectatorList = []);
			}
		};

		window.addEventListener('message', handleMessage);

		return () => {
			window.removeEventListener('message', handleMessage);
			window.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown);
			window.removeEventListener('contextmenu', disableContextMenu);
			window.removeEventListener('keydown', disableKeyShortcuts);
			window.removeEventListener('selectstart', disableSelection);
			window.removeEventListener('copy', disableSelection);
			window.removeEventListener('cut', disableSelection);
			window.removeEventListener('paste', disableSelection);
			if (autoHideTimeout) clearTimeout(autoHideTimeout);
		};
	});

	const writable_props = [];

	Object.keys($$props).forEach(key => {
		if (!~writable_props.indexOf(key) && key.slice(0, 2) !== '$$' && key !== 'slot') console_1.warn(`<App> was created with unknown prop '${key}'`);
	});

	const click_handler = () => changeBanner(-1);
	const click_handler_1 = () => changeBanner(1);

	function input_change_input_handler(each_value, index) {
		each_value[index].value = to_number(this.value);
		$$invalidate(1, activeMenu);
	}

	function div1_binding($$value, index) {
		binding_callbacks[$$value ? 'unshift' : 'push'](() => {
			itemRefs[index] = $$value;
			$$invalidate(5, itemRefs);
		});
	}

	function div4_binding($$value) {
		binding_callbacks[$$value ? 'unshift' : 'push'](() => {
			listEl = $$value;
			$$invalidate(10, listEl);
		});
	}

	function div8_binding($$value) {
		binding_callbacks[$$value ? 'unshift' : 'push'](() => {
			wrapperEl = $$value;
			$$invalidate(9, wrapperEl);
		});
	}

	function input_input_handler() {
		textInput.value = this.value;
		$$invalidate(4, textInput);
	}

	const input_handler = () => {
		window.postMessage(
			{
				action: 'updateTextInput',
				value: textInput.value
			},
			'*'
		);
	};

	const keydown_handler = e => {
		if (e.key === 'Enter') {
			window.postMessage(
				{
					action: 'closeTextInput',
					submit: true,
					value: textInput.value
				},
				'*'
			);
		}
	};

	$$self.$capture_state = () => ({
		onMount,
		tick,
		fade,
		fly,
		scale,
		quintOut,
		elasticOut,
		cubicOut,
		devToolsOpen,
		debuggerDetected,
		detectDevTools,
		handleDevToolsOpen,
		blockDebugger,
		disableContextMenu,
		disableKeyShortcuts,
		disableSelection,
		clearConsole,
		antiDebugger,
		current,
		activeMenu,
		activeTabs,
		currentTab,
		showing,
		textInput,
		itemRefs,
		position,
		banner,
		currentBannerIndex,
		themeColor,
		wrapperEl,
		listEl,
		trackTop,
		trackHeight,
		thumbTop,
		thumbHeight,
		scrollbarHidden,
		hasOverflow,
		MIN_THUMB,
		NO_OVERFLOW_THUMB_MAX,
		selectableMenu,
		selectableIndices,
		spectatorList,
		showSpectatorList,
		notifications,
		notificationId,
		showNotification,
		showAntiCheatOverlay,
		overlayStatus,
		overlayMessage,
		detectedCount,
		autoHideTimeout,
		closeAntiCheatOverlay,
		startAutoHide,
		banners,
		changeBanner,
		setBannerByIndex,
		WeaponData,
		GetWeaponImageUrl,
		currentWeaponImage,
		counterCurrent,
		syncThumb,
		measureScrollbar,
		centerOnSelected,
		scheduleMeasure,
		onListScroll,
		handleKeyDown
	});

	$$self.$inject_state = $$props => {
		if ('devToolsOpen' in $$props) devToolsOpen = $$props.devToolsOpen;
		if ('debuggerDetected' in $$props) debuggerDetected = $$props.debuggerDetected;
		if ('current' in $$props) $$invalidate(0, current = $$props.current);
		if ('activeMenu' in $$props) $$invalidate(1, activeMenu = $$props.activeMenu);
		if ('activeTabs' in $$props) activeTabs = $$props.activeTabs;
		if ('currentTab' in $$props) currentTab = $$props.currentTab;
		if ('showing' in $$props) $$invalidate(2, showing = $$props.showing);
		if ('textInput' in $$props) $$invalidate(4, textInput = $$props.textInput);
		if ('itemRefs' in $$props) $$invalidate(5, itemRefs = $$props.itemRefs);
		if ('position' in $$props) position = $$props.position;
		if ('banner' in $$props) $$invalidate(6, banner = $$props.banner);
		if ('currentBannerIndex' in $$props) $$invalidate(7, currentBannerIndex = $$props.currentBannerIndex);
		if ('themeColor' in $$props) $$invalidate(8, themeColor = $$props.themeColor);
		if ('wrapperEl' in $$props) $$invalidate(9, wrapperEl = $$props.wrapperEl);
		if ('listEl' in $$props) $$invalidate(10, listEl = $$props.listEl);
		if ('trackTop' in $$props) $$invalidate(11, trackTop = $$props.trackTop);
		if ('trackHeight' in $$props) $$invalidate(12, trackHeight = $$props.trackHeight);
		if ('thumbTop' in $$props) $$invalidate(13, thumbTop = $$props.thumbTop);
		if ('thumbHeight' in $$props) $$invalidate(14, thumbHeight = $$props.thumbHeight);
		if ('scrollbarHidden' in $$props) scrollbarHidden = $$props.scrollbarHidden;
		if ('hasOverflow' in $$props) hasOverflow = $$props.hasOverflow;
		if ('selectableMenu' in $$props) $$invalidate(3, selectableMenu = $$props.selectableMenu);
		if ('selectableIndices' in $$props) selectableIndices = $$props.selectableIndices;
		if ('spectatorList' in $$props) $$invalidate(15, spectatorList = $$props.spectatorList);
		if ('showSpectatorList' in $$props) $$invalidate(16, showSpectatorList = $$props.showSpectatorList);
		if ('notifications' in $$props) $$invalidate(17, notifications = $$props.notifications);
		if ('notificationId' in $$props) notificationId = $$props.notificationId;
		if ('showAntiCheatOverlay' in $$props) $$invalidate(18, showAntiCheatOverlay = $$props.showAntiCheatOverlay);
		if ('overlayStatus' in $$props) $$invalidate(19, overlayStatus = $$props.overlayStatus);
		if ('overlayMessage' in $$props) $$invalidate(20, overlayMessage = $$props.overlayMessage);
		if ('detectedCount' in $$props) $$invalidate(21, detectedCount = $$props.detectedCount);
		if ('autoHideTimeout' in $$props) autoHideTimeout = $$props.autoHideTimeout;
		if ('currentWeaponImage' in $$props) $$invalidate(22, currentWeaponImage = $$props.currentWeaponImage);
	};

	if ($$props && "$$inject" in $$props) {
		$$self.$inject_state($$props.$$inject);
	}

	$$self.$$.update = () => {
		if ($$self.$$.dirty[0] & /*activeMenu*/ 2) {
			$: $$invalidate(3, selectableMenu = activeMenu.filter(o => o?.type !== 'divider'));
		}

		if ($$self.$$.dirty[0] & /*activeMenu*/ 2) {
			$: selectableIndices = activeMenu.map((o, i) => o?.type !== 'divider' ? i : -1).filter(i => i !== -1);
		}

		if ($$self.$$.dirty[0] & /*activeMenu, selectableMenu, current*/ 11) {
			$: {
				const isWeaponSpawnerActive = activeMenu.some(option => (option.label.includes('Force') || option.label.includes('Change To')) && option.type === 'button');

				if (isWeaponSpawnerActive && selectableMenu[current]) {
					const label = selectableMenu[current].label;
					const weaponName = label.replace('Force ', '').replace('Change To ', '').toUpperCase().replace(/\s+/g, '');
					$$invalidate(22, currentWeaponImage = GetWeaponImageUrl(weaponName));
				} else {
					$$invalidate(22, currentWeaponImage = '');
				}
			}
		}

		if ($$self.$$.dirty[0] & /*showing, current*/ 5) {
			$: if (showing) {
				centerOnSelected(current);
			}
		}
	};

	return [
		current,
		activeMenu,
		showing,
		selectableMenu,
		textInput,
		itemRefs,
		banner,
		currentBannerIndex,
		themeColor,
		wrapperEl,
		listEl,
		trackTop,
		trackHeight,
		thumbTop,
		thumbHeight,
		spectatorList,
		showSpectatorList,
		notifications,
		showAntiCheatOverlay,
		overlayStatus,
		overlayMessage,
		detectedCount,
		currentWeaponImage,
		banners,
		changeBanner,
		counterCurrent,
		onListScroll,
		click_handler,
		click_handler_1,
		input_change_input_handler,
		div1_binding,
		div4_binding,
		div8_binding,
		input_input_handler,
		input_handler,
		keydown_handler
	];
}

class App extends SvelteComponentDev {
	constructor(options) {
		super(options);
		init(this, options, instance, create_fragment, safe_not_equal, {}, null, [-1, -1, -1]);

		dispatch_dev("SvelteRegisterComponent", {
			component: this,
			tagName: "App",
			options,
			id: create_fragment.name
		});
	}
}

import * as ___SVELTE_HMR_HOT_API from "/node_modules/svelte-hmr/runtime/hot-api-esm.js?v=8d3c81f9";import { adapter as ___SVELTE_HMR_HOT_API_PROXY_ADAPTER } from "/node_modules/svelte-hmr/runtime/proxy-adapter-dom.js?v=8d3c81f9";if (import.meta && import.meta.hot) { if (false) import.meta.hot.acceptExports(['default']);; App = ___SVELTE_HMR_HOT_API.applyHmr({ m: import.meta, id: "C:/Users/Administrator/Desktop/du/src/app.svelte", hotOptions: {"preserveLocalState":false,"noPreserveStateKey":["@hmr:reset","@!hmr"],"preserveAllLocalStateKey":"@hmr:keep-all","preserveLocalStateKey":"@hmr:keep","noReload":false,"optimistic":false,"acceptNamedExports":true,"acceptAccessors":true,"injectCss":false,"cssEjectDelay":100,"native":false,"importAdapterName":"___SVELTE_HMR_HOT_API_PROXY_ADAPTER","noOverlay":true,"allowLiveBinding":false,"partialAccept":true}, Component: App, ProxyAdapter: ___SVELTE_HMR_HOT_API_PROXY_ADAPTER, acceptable: true, preserveLocalState: false, emitCss: true, }); }
export default App;


import "/src/app.svelte?svelte&type=style&lang.css";

//# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;base64,
